DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ANGELA COOPER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF-OFFICE OF TREASURER/TAX COLLECTOR

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. VISITING JUDGE CECILIA CASTELLANOS. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF CCSF-OFFICE OF TREASURER/TAX COLLECTOR IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT VICTOR MARTINEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED (D506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,663.00 FILED BY CCSF-OFFICE OF TREASURER/TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, VICTOR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-22-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
